title: Amtech T0707 40mm Long Shackle Rhombic Chrome Plated Iron Padlock

EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer 40mm long shackle rhombic chrome plated iron padlock Chrome-plated iron body with plastic cover 6 mm diameter hardened steel shackle Shackle internal dimensions 20 x 64 mm Durable brass lock barrel Supplied with 3 keys
